title: steffensia obliqua
intro: Steffensia obliqua, a plant species native to the tropical forests of Asia, is a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The Steffensia obliqua plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Steffensia obliqua has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Steffensia obliqua can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
